title: Results
description: Find official race results and review the latest published standings.

discovery.title: Find official results
discovery.description: Search by runner name, bib, or event to find the official results page fast.

directory.title: Official results directory
directory.description: Official results published for each event edition.
directory.empty: No official editions match the selected context.

searchResults.title: Search matches
searchResults.description: Official matches based on your current search.
searchResults.empty: No official matches found for this search.

panel.title: How it works
panel.description: A quick explanation of how official results and rankings work.
panel.point1: Official means the Race Director has published the results for that edition.
panel.point2: If a correction is made, a new version is published with visible history.
panel.point3: Rankings use published official versions only.

explainer.title: How official results and rankings work
explainer.description: This page explains what “Official” means, how corrections are published, and how rankings use those results.

officialMeaning.title: What “Official” means
officialMeaning.point1: Official results are published by the Race Director for that edition.
officialMeaning.point2: Draft data is not presented as official public record.

correctionProcess.title: How corrections work
correctionProcess.point1: Approved corrections publish a new corrected version instead of overwriting history.
correctionProcess.point2: Public pages expose correction context so changes remain transparent.

rankingsRules.title: How rankings use results
rankingsRules.point1: Rankings are computed from published official or corrected versions only.
rankingsRules.point2: The rules reference is versioned so each published ranking can be traced back.

corrections.title: Recent corrections
corrections.description: When official data changes, we publish a short summary with timing and attribution.

fallback.noChanges: No detailed field changes were provided.

official.title: {seriesName} {editionLabel} Official results
official.subtitle: This link always points to the latest official or corrected results for this edition.

trustScan.title: Quick check
trustScan.description: Key details for this official publication.

table.title: Published results
table.description: Sample rows from the latest official publication.
table.empty: No published entries are available yet for this official version.

nonOfficial.description: Official results are not finalized for this edition yet.
nonOfficial.noDraftDisclosure: Draft and non-official data are not shown on this public URL.
